checkedEvidence: Model unsupported failure shows a supported model or capability recovery hint
Permission denied failure does not call Intelligence SDK and shows a permission recovery hint
surfaces.notes: 2026-06-18 packaged app + isolated userData + CDP hotkey capture opened the real CoreBox target; bodyClass=MacIntel core-box and inputIdExists=true. 2026-06-18 provider-enabled AI Ask probe loaded touch-intelligence, enabled touch-intelligence.intelligence-ask search provider, entered a real CoreBox query, and captured visible NEXUS_STREAM_UNSUPPORTED model/capability failure UI. 2026-06-18 runtime permission-denied probe loaded touch-intelligence with grants, revoked intelligence.basic through packaged renderer IPC before CoreBox AI Ask execution, and captured visible permission recovery UI without an Intelligence SDK invocation. Startup-time missing intelligence.basic blocks plugin enablement before CoreBox AI Ask UI appears; that attempt is a blocker note, not permission-denied UI evidence. Raw probe logs, pid files, output mirrors and duplicate stage screenshots are intentionally not referenced by the manifest.
